meta.title: Hero Gear Calculator | KingshotData
meta.description: Kingshot hero gear calculator. Quickly calculate the materials needed for Enhancement, Temper, and Mastery Forging by stage range.

page.title: Kingshot Hero Gear Calculator
page.description: Calculate the materials you need from base enhancement all the way to Mythic T6 3-star hero gear, then share your results easily.

messages.emptyDefault: Select gear and stages to see the result instantly.
messages.selectItemFirst: Please select at least one gear item.
messages.invalidStage: The target stage must be higher than the current stage.
